CustomField.description: The parent Supplemental Rent Utilization record. The parent record displays the Max/Sum of all defined MR rates and that flows to the MR Invoice line item.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The parent Supplemental Rent Utilization record. The parent record displays the Max/Sum of all defined MR rates and that flows to the MR Invoice line item.
CustomField.label: Supplemental Rent Utilization
